name: Medical emergency while travelling abroad
description: User is abroad and needs emergency medical help — what does travel insurance cover

input.message: I'm in Thailand and got food poisoning. I need to go to a hospital. I have Bajaj Allianz travel insurance with ₹50 lakh cover. What should I do? Will the insurance pay directly?

notes: URGENT scenario — must lead with action steps: 1) Call 24x7 helpline number immediately, 2) Go to nearest hospital, 3) Insurer may arrange cashless at network hospitals, 4) Keep all bills/prescriptions, 5) File claim within specified period after return.
